replies.msg:
話說係AMAZON US 買左部aero 15,美國西部時間16/5 寄到東部時間23/5集運收貨再用shipbao寄番黎香港, 網頁顯示出左倉等左大概7日, 1/6 先更新左做已空運(寫住預計10日後到港,即11/6)
結果就6/6收到提示信息話到左,7/6下就到埋自提點.

廢話少講, 去圖



















Product Specifications:
Operating System: Microsoft Windows 10 Home (64 Bit)
Display: 15.6" IPS Full HD (1920 x 1080) 144Hz Wide Viewing Angle Anti-Glare Display
Graphics Card: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 8GB GDDR5 (Max-Q)
Processor: 8th Gen Intel Coffee Lake Core i7-8750H Six Core (2.2GHz-4.1GHz, 9MB Intel Smart Cache, 45W)
Memory: 32GB (2x 16GB) DDR4 2666MHz (Upgraded by EXcaliberPC)
Hard Drive: 512GB PCIe NVMe SSD
Networking: 10/100/1000Mbps Ethernet (LAN), 802.11ac (Wireless LAN) + Bluetooth v4.2 + LE
Ports: 2x USB 3.1 Gen1 (Type-A), USB 3.1 Gen2 (Type-A), Thunderbolt 3 (USB Type-C), HDMI 2.0, Mini DisplayPort 1.4, RJ45 LAN, Combo Audio Jack, SD Card Reader(UHS-II)
Keyboard: Gigabyte Fusion Per Key RGB Keyboard
Battery: Li Polymer 94.24Wh, 180W

小問題: 用個MOUSE會突然LAG一下, 官方話係WINDOWS撞左Nvidia optimus...
